issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates the effect lasts only while attacking/this turn phase, not until end of turn. Should be 'DuringYourTurn' or similar turn-scoped duration, not 'EndOfTurn'.
Target should specify 'up to 1' (optional selection). Current 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' may imply mandatory selection. Should use 'max':1 or similar optional targeting mechanism.
